title: dpi open array support (LRM 35.5.6.1 Open arrays)

features.name: dpi function parameter open array declaration
features.description: Code should include a DPI-C import function declaration with an open array parameter using empty brackets [] syntax
features.snippet: import "DPI-C" function int shunt_dpi_send_bitN(input int sockid, input int size, input bit[] bitN);
